creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 161745
patch for audio/soundconverter

This is a patch (svn diff) to upgrade audio/soundconverter
from 1.54 to 2.1.5

Changes
PORTVERSION
MASTER_SITES to upstreams preferred location (launchpad.net)

That's it!

Please also find QA log, attached to this pr(1).

Thanks!

--Chris
